A [[Species/Legends|species]] of '''rabbit''' lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The [[Warrick family/Legends|Warrick family]] kept a brown one in [[Warrick family hut|their hut]].<ref name="CoC" />

{{Creature-stub}}
